mapper.select: SELECT t.tender_version_id, t.project_id, p.project_name, t.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, t.version_no, t.version_type, t.status, t.current_flag, t.parent_version_id, t.effective_time, t.publish_time, t.summary, t.remark, t.version, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM t_bid_tender_version t INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = t.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = t.lot_id WHERE t.tender_version_id = #{tenderVersionId} AND t.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT t.tender_version_id, t.project_id, p.project_name, t.lot_id, l.lot_code, l.lot_name, t.version_no, t.version_type, t.status, t.current_flag, t.parent_version_id, t.effective_time, t.publish_time, t.summary, t.remark, t.version, t.create_time, t.update_time FROM t_bid_tender_version t INNER JOIN t_bid_project p ON p.project_id = t.project_id INNER JOIN t_bid_lot l ON l.lot_id = t.lot_id WHERE t.lot_id = #{lotId} AND t.status = 'ACTIVE' AND t.current_flag = 1 AND t.deleted_flag = 0 AND p.deleted_flag = 0 AND l.deleted_flag = 0 LIMIT 1
SELECT MAX(version_no) FROM t_bid_tender_version WHERE lot_id = #{lotId} AND deleted_flag = 0
mapper.update:
UPDATE t_bid_tender_version
version_type = #{versionType}, status = #{status}, current_flag = #{currentFlag}, current_flag = NULL, effective_time = #{effectiveTime}, publish_user_id = #{publishUserId}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, summary = #{summary}, remark = #{remark}, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1
WHERE tender_version_id = #{tenderVersionId} AND version = #{version} AND deleted_flag = 0

UPDATE t_bid_tender_version SET status = 'SUPERSEDED', current_flag = NULL, update_user_id = #{updateUserId}, version = version + 1 WHERE lot_id = #{lotId} AND current_flag = 1 AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND deleted_flag = 0
AND tender_version_id != #{excludeTenderVersionId}
